title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores how logarithms can be applied to images by examining Escher's Print Gallery through complex analysis. The video uses conformal maps and complex exponential functions to explain the mathematical structure underlying the artwork, providing both theoretical foundations and visual demonstrations.
